decision.operational_objective: Optimize leak-safe forward wagering performance after joining a pre-bet market snapshot; top1 flat betting is diagnostic only.
decision.predictive_boundary: Base predictive models must not consume odds, implied probability, popularity, or targets derived from them.
decision.market_boundary: Odds are required in the post-inference repricing and execution layer for market probability, expected value, edge, selection, liquidity limits, and stake sizing.
decision.recommended_first_architecture: A market-free tabular horse encoder with race-context set aggregation and a masked race softmax winner head.
decision.sota_reading: No standardized public horse-racing benchmark was found that justifies adopting one horse-racing architecture as established SOTA. Use established set/listwise components and compare them against strong tabular baselines under one forward protocol.

candidate_matrix.name: catboost_strength_temperature_softmax
candidate_matrix.model: Market-free CatBoost race-group ranker; fit out-of-fold temperature or monotone mapping on strength, then apply race softmax.
advantages: Separates ranking capacity from probability closure
Cheap enough for broad walk-forward comparison
risks: Post-hoc closure cannot create missing race interactions
Calibration may drift by field size and race regime

candidate_matrix.name: catboost_race_conditional_multinomial
candidate_matrix.model: Shared horse utility model trained with race-group conditional softmax cross-entropy so exactly one winner probability mass is allocated per race.
advantages: Objective matches the mutually exclusive winner outcome
Produces a closed race probability vector directly
Keeps CatBoost handling of heterogeneous tabular and categorical data
risks: Requires a custom grouped objective or exported utility-training path
Horse utilities see race context only through engineered aggregate features

candidate_matrix.name: tabular_encoder_deepsets_softmax
candidate_matrix.model: Encode each runner's pre-race tabular features, aggregate the runner set with permutation-invariant pooling, concatenate race context back to each runner, and train a masked race softmax winner head.
advantages: Models variable field sizes and race-relative context
Permutation equivariance matches the runner-set structure
risks: Categorical encoding and missingness handling need careful parity with CatBoost
More sensitive to temporal drift and training protocol

candidate_matrix.name: tabular_encoder_set_transformer_softmax
candidate_matrix.model: Use runner embeddings with self-attention or induced set attention, followed by a masked race softmax winner head.
advantages: Can represent pairwise and higher-order runner interactions
Naturally handles a race as an unordered set
risks: Must beat DeepSets and CatBoost controls to justify complexity
Published set-model SOTA claims are not horse-racing-specific

predictive_metrics: calibration by field size, race class, surface, and odds band
evaluation_contract.policy_rule: For every candidate, join the same as-of odds snapshot after inference; compute normalized market probability, model expected return, model-minus-market edge, selection, and uncertainty-aware fractional stake.
evaluation_contract.selection_tuning: Tune EV, edge, odds, and stake parameters only inside each training/validation fold. Never tune them on the held-out replay window.

odds_provenance_contract.join_rule: For each simulated decision, use only the latest valid snapshot at or before bet_cutoff_at.
odds_provenance_contract.current_limitation: Historical JRA result/odds tables contain odds without an observation timestamp, so they cannot prove pre-bet availability and are not sufficient for formal live-policy ROI.
odds_provenance_contract.reason_for_multiple_cutoffs: Parimutuel prices move before close; sensitivity across cutoffs is part of operational validity.

research_sources.title: Deep Sets
research_sources.use: Permutation-invariant/equivariant modeling foundation for variable runner sets.

research_sources.title: Set Transformer: A Framework for Attention-based Permutation-Invariant Neural Networks
research_sources.use: Attention-based interaction modeling for set-structured race fields.

research_sources.title: Learning to Rank under Multinomial Logit Choice
research_sources.use: Supports treating a list as a joint single-choice problem rather than independent binary choices.

research_sources.title: Kelly Betting on Horse Races with Uncertainty in Probability Estimates
research_sources.use: Probability estimation uncertainty should reduce or robustify Kelly-style exposure.

research_sources.title: Optimal sports betting strategies in practice: an experimental review
research_sources.use: Unified evaluation of sports-betting allocation methods, including horse racing.

research_sources.title: Ornstein-Uhlenbeck Process for Horse Race Betting: A Micro-Macro Analysis of Herding and Informed Bettors
research_sources.use: JRA odds are dynamic parimutuel market observations, reinforcing cutoff-specific replay rather than static final-odds assumptions.
